hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】美联储主席沃什预计将在央行利率前景中保留“点”；【WORLD】非洲疾病预防控制中心：埃博拉疫情可能成为有记录以来最严重的疫情酋长警告；【AI】BBVA 通过 OpenAI 将人工智能置于银行业的核心。

items.title: Fed Chair Warsh expected to withhold 'dot' from central bank's interest rate outlook
items.summary: The central bank's Federal Open Market Committee is set to release its quarterly update of where individual officials expect interest rates to head.
items.title_zh: 美联储主席沃什预计将在央行利率前景中保留“点”
items.summary_zh: 央行联邦公开市场委员会将发布个人官员预期利率走向的季度更新。

items.title: Ebola Outbreak Could Become Worst on Record, Africa C.D.C. Chief Warns
items.summary: Health workers have warned that the outbreak, already one of the worst in decades, could take as long as a year to contain if infection rates do not flatten.
items.title_zh: 非洲疾病预防控制中心：埃博拉疫情可能成为有记录以来最严重的疫情酋长警告
items.summary_zh: 卫生工作者警告说，这场疫情已经是几十年来最严重的疫情之一，如果感染率不趋于平缓，可能需要长达一年的时间才能得到控制。

items.title: BBVA puts AI at the core of banking with OpenAI
items.summary: Learn how BBVA scaled ChatGPT Enterprise to 100,000 employees and partnered with OpenAI to accelerate AI-powered banking transformation worldwide.
items.title_zh: BBVA 通过 OpenAI 将人工智能置于银行业的核心
items.summary_zh: 了解 BBVA 如何将 ChatGPT Enterprise 扩展到 100,000 名员工，并与 OpenAI 合作，加速全球人工智能驱动的银行业转型。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Trump Says He Hopes to Put War in ‘Rearview Mirror’
items.summary: Iran’s foreign minister said new talks on nuclear arms and sanctions relief would start on Friday, right after an initial agreement is signed.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：特朗普表示希望将战争置于“后视镜”中
items.summary_zh: 伊朗外长表示，有关核武器和制裁解除的新谈判将于周五签署初步协议后开始。

items.title: Bitcoin DeFi demand concentrated in small-but-deep pockets, Rootstock exec says
items.summary: DeFi liquidity is down, with total value locked dropping from roughly $180 billion to $70 billion in less than a year.
items.title_zh: Rootstock 高管表示，比特币 DeFi 需求集中在财力虽小但资金雄厚的人群
items.summary_zh: DeFi 流动性下降，锁定的总价值在不到一年的时间里从约 1800 亿美元跌至 700 亿美元。

items.title: Introducing the OpenAI Partner Network
items.summary: OpenAI launches the Partner Network, investing $150M to help global partners accelerate enterprise AI adoption, deployment, and transformation.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 合作伙伴网络简介
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出合作伙伴网络，投资 1.5 亿美元帮助全球合作伙伴加速企业人工智能的采用、部署和转型。

items.title: How Preply combines AI and human tutors to personalize learning
items.summary: Preply uses OpenAI to launch AI-generated lesson summaries, providing personalised feedback and language learning exercises.
items.title_zh: Preply 如何结合人工智能和真人导师来实现个性化学习
items.summary_zh: Preply 使用 OpenAI 推出人工智能生成的课程摘要，提供个性化反馈和语言学习练习。

items.title: When it comes to predicting people’s preferences, it pays to consider “the power of three”
items.summary: MIT researchers provide a major upgrade to the nearly century-old idea of random utility models.
items.title_zh: 在预测人们的偏好时，考虑“三者的力量”是值得的
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员对近百年历史的随机效用模型理念进行了重大升级。

items.title: Michael Burry says he's tempted to bet against SpaceX, but passes on expensive options
items.summary: Burry argued the company's market capitalization had reached levels that dwarf many established businesses and fortunes.
items.title_zh: 迈克尔·伯里 (Michael Burry) 表示，他很想做空 SpaceX，但放弃了昂贵的选择
items.summary_zh: 伯里认为，该公司的市值已达到令许多老牌企业和财富相形见绌的水平。

items.title: Tehran selling deal with US as victory – but for Iranians it was necessity
items.summary: For many Iranians, the question is not whether the deal means victory, but whether it lowers prices and reduces fear of another war.
items.title_zh: 德黑兰与美国达成的协议被视为胜利——但对伊朗人来说这是必要的
items.summary_zh: 对于许多伊朗人来说，问题不在于该协议是否意味着胜利，而在于它是否会降低价格并减少对另一场战争的恐惧。

items.title: Fragile quiet in Lebanon as US-Iran truce leaves unanswered questions
items.summary: Many Lebanese remain doubtful that the agreement could finally mean the end of the fighting between Israel and Hezbollah.
items.title_zh: 美伊休战留下悬而未决的问题，黎巴嫩局势脆弱平静
items.summary_zh: 许多黎巴嫩人仍然怀疑该协议是否最终意味着以色列和真主党之间战斗的结束。

items.title: UK investigating reports Russian warship fired warning shots near yacht in English Channel
items.summary: BBC News understands the yacht had drifted towards the Admiral Grigorovich, a Russian frigate which has been operating in the Channel.
items.title_zh: 英国调查报告称俄罗斯军舰在英吉利海峡附近的游艇附近鸣枪示警
items.summary_zh: 据英国广播公司新闻了解，这艘游艇已漂向在英吉利海峡执行任务的俄罗斯护卫舰格里戈罗维奇海军上将号。

items.title: Naval Mines Could Still Stymie Gulf Shipping After War
items.summary: The U.S. Navy will be deploying a new generation of drone-based countermeasures to search the sea floor and surface for any mines Iran laid.
items.title_zh: 战后水雷仍可能阻碍海湾航运
items.summary_zh: 美国海军将部署新一代无人机反制措施，在海底和海面搜寻伊朗埋设的水雷。

items.title: Iran Will Enter Nuclear Talks With the Trump Administration Feeling Emboldened
items.summary: Despite military setbacks during the war, Tehran is presenting a narrative of victory before negotiations with Washington.
items.title_zh: 伊朗将与特朗普政府进行核谈判，信心大增
items.summary_zh: 尽管在战争期间遭遇军事挫折，德黑兰在与华盛顿谈判之前仍呈现出胜利的景象。

items.title: Russian Navy Ship Accused of Firing Warning Shots at U.K. Yacht
items.summary: Britain’s Defense Ministry said it was investigating a report that a Russian vessel fired warning shots near a U.K.-registered yacht in the English Channel on Tuesday.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯海军舰艇被指控向英国游艇开枪警告
items.summary_zh: 英国国防部表示，正在调查有关周二一艘俄罗斯船只在英吉利海峡附近一艘在英国注册的游艇附近鸣枪示警的报道。

items.title: Coinbase intoduces AI advisor, stock options, and pre-IPO markets in finance push
items.summary: The crypto exchange is expanding into investing, derivatives and banking services as it pursues an all-in-one financial platform.
items.title_zh: Coinbase 在金融推动中引入人工智能顾问、股票期权和 IPO 前市场
items.summary_zh: 该加密货币交易所正在将业务扩展到投资、衍生品和银行服务领域，以打造一体化的金融平台。

items.title: Ripple invests in Flutterwave, pushing its stablecoin and XRP Ledger into payments across Africa
items.summary: The deal values Flutterwave at $3.2 billion, and will integrate Ripple's RLUSD and the XRP Ledger network to speed cross-border payments across Africa.
items.title_zh: Ripple 投资 Flutterwave，将其稳定币和 XRP Ledger 推向非洲支付领域
items.summary_zh: 该交易对 Flutterwave 的估值为 32 亿美元，并将整合 Ripple 的 RLUSD 和 XRP Ledger 网络，以加快整个非洲的跨境支付。

items.title: Ethereum’s biggest protocol overhaul in years moves into its final development stage
items.summary: Developers are entering the final stretch of work on Glamsterdam, the network's next major upgrade, as teams begin testing a version of the fork in a closed environment.
items.title_zh: 以太坊多年来最大的协议改革进入最后开发阶段
items.summary_zh: 随着团队开始在封闭环境中测试分叉版本，开发人员正在进入 Glamsterdam（网络的下一个重大升级）的最后阶段工作。

items.title: Pump.fun activity craters 80% in three months, dragging Solana fees lower as traders rotate into perps
items.summary: The platform's fall from grace is best reflected in the PUMP token itself, which is down 40% in the last six months alone.
items.title_zh: Pump.fun 活动在三个月内下降了 80%，随着交易员转为 Perps，Solana 费用下降
items.summary_zh: 该平台的失势最能体现在 PUMP 代币本身上，仅在过去六个月内就下跌了 40%。

items.title: Squid adds Ripple’s RLUSD stablecoin for cross-chain swaps
items.summary: Cross-chain platform Squid has integrated Ripple's RLUSD stablecoin, allowing users to swap into and out of RLUSD across chains and assets.
items.title_zh: Squid 添加 Ripple 的 RLUSD 稳定币用于跨链交换
items.summary_zh: 跨链平台Squid集成了Ripple的RLUSD稳定币，允许用户跨链跨资产换入和换出RLUSD。

items.title: Forward Solana treasury stock jumps 8% as smaller DATs reject acquisition bids
items.summary: Solana DAT stocks are moving on Tuesday as the largest SOL DAT Forward works to keep its acquisition bids alive.
items.title_zh: 由于规模较小的 DAT 拒绝收购要约，Forward Solana 库存股上涨 8%
items.summary_zh: Solana DAT 股票周二走势，最大的 SOL DAT Forward 努力保持其收购要约。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Zano (ZANO)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #208.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：ZANO (ZANO)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 208 位。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Hyperliquid (HYPE)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #10.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Hyperliquid (HYPE)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 10。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Uniswap (UNI)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #44.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Uniswap (UNI)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 44。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Pudgy Penguins (PENGU)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #114.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：矮胖企鹅 (PENGU)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 114。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Worldcoin (WLD)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #42.
items.title_zh: 流行加密货币：世界币（WLD）
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 42 位。

items.title: Supporting Europe’s work in ensuring a trustworthy AI ecosystem
items.summary: OpenAI supports the EU Code of Practice on AI content transparency, advancing provenance standards and tools to help people understand AI-generated content.
items.title_zh: 支持欧洲确保值得信赖的人工智能生态系统的工作
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 支持欧盟关于人工智能内容透明度的实践准则，推进来源标准和工具以帮助人们理解人工智能生成的内容。

items.title: Jinhua Zhao named head of the Department of Urban Studies and Planning
items.summary: An expert in behavioral science and transportation, Zhao combines these studies with AI and public policy to address some of the most urgent challenges facing cities.
items.title_zh: 赵金华出任城市研究与规划系主任
items.summary_zh: 作为行为科学和交通领域的专家，赵将这些研究与人工智能和公共政策相结合，以解决城市面临的一些最紧迫的挑战。

items.title: The consequences of relying on AI for accurate news
items.summary: A Media Lab study shows that, much like how GPS has weakened our navigation skills, AI can make us worse at detecting fake news.
items.title_zh: 依靠人工智能获取准确新闻的后果
items.summary_zh: 媒体实验室的一项研究表明，就像 GPS 削弱了我们的导航技能一样，人工智能也会让我们更不擅长检测假新闻。

items.title: Teaching AI agents to ask better questions by playing “Battleship”
items.summary: MIT researchers use the classic game as a test bed for AI agents, finding a small AI model can outperform the biggest ones at 1 percent of the cost.
items.title_zh: 通过玩“战舰”来教人工智能代理提出更好的问题
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员使用这款经典游戏作为 AI 代理的测试平台，发现小型 AI 模型可以以 1% 的成本超越最大的模型。

items.title: Prediction market traders speculate Anthropic will restore access quickly to AI model after Trump admin directed it to limit reach
items.summary: Traders think it's more likely than not that access is restored by July 1.
items.title_zh: 预测市场交易员推测，在特朗普政府指示限制范围后，Anthropic 将迅速恢复对人工智能模型的访问
items.summary_zh: 交易员认为，访问很有可能在 7 月 1 日之前恢复。

items.title: Hyperliquid, Uniswap and Worldcoin buck crypto slump as traders chase AI, DeFi trends
items.summary: A handful of tokens continued their run while bitcoin and the rest of the crypto market stalled after the early week bounce.
items.title_zh: 随着交易员追逐人工智能、DeFi 趋势，Hyperliquid、Uniswap 和 Worldcoin 逆势加密货币暴跌
items.summary_zh: 少数代币继续上涨，而比特币和其他加密货币市场在本周初的反弹后陷入停滞。

items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Uniswap (UNI) gains 12.9% while index trades lower
items.summary: Stellar (XLM), up 2.7% from Monday, joined Uniswap (UNI) as a top performer.
items.title_zh: CoinDesk 20 业绩更新：Uniswap (UNI) 上涨 12.9%，而指数交易走低
items.summary_zh: Stellar (XLM) 较周一上涨 2.7%，与 Uniswap (UNI) 一起成为表现最佳的股票。

items.title: BlackRock's new bitcoin income fund offers cash flow alongside BTC exposure
items.summary: After IBIT's $49 billion success, BlackRock says clients are increasingly seeking ways to earn income from long-term bitcoin holdings.
items.title_zh: 贝莱德新推出的比特币收益基金在提供比特币敞口的同时提供现金流
items.summary_zh: 在 IBIT 取得 490 亿美元的成功之后，贝莱德表示，客户越来越多地寻求从长期持有比特币中赚取收入的方法。

items.title: Coinbase unveils ‘System Update’ unlocking an AI advisor, global unified liquidity, options trading and more
items.summary: Coinbase's latest System Update includes a new AI-powered advisor and global unified liquidity between its U.S. and international platforms.
items.title_zh: Coinbase 推出“系统更新”，解锁人工智能顾问、全球统一流动性、期权交易等
items.summary_zh: Coinbase 的最新系统更新包括新的人工智能顾问以及美国和国际平台之间的全球统一流动性。

items.title: Coinbase launching tokenized US stocks, backed 1:1, with holders able to receive dividends
items.summary: Both rivals like Robinhood and Kraken and traditional financial institutions have shown an interest in offering tokenized shares.
items.title_zh: Coinbase推出代币化美股，支持1:1，持有者可获得股息
items.summary_zh: Robinhood 和 Kraken 等竞争对手以及传统金融机构都对提供代币化股票表现出了兴趣。

items.title: Predicting model behavior before release by simulating deployment
items.summary: OpenAI introduces Deployment Simulation, a method to predict AI model behavior before deployment using real conversation data to improve safety and evaluation accuracy.
items.title_zh: 通过模拟部署来预测发布前的模型行为
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 引入了部署模拟，这是一种在部署前使用真实对话数据预测 AI 模型行为的方法，以提高安全性和评估准确性。

items.title: Access OpenAI models and Codex through your Oracle cloud commitment
items.summary: Access OpenAI models and Codex through Oracle Cloud, using existing commitments to build and deploy AI with enterprise security and governance.
items.title_zh: 通过 Oracle 云承诺访问 OpenAI 模型和 Codex
items.summary_zh: 通过 Oracle Cloud 访问 OpenAI 模型和 Codex，利用现有承诺构建和部署具有企业安全性和治理的 AI。

items.title: olmo-eval: An evaluation workbench for the model development loop
items.title_zh: olmo-eval：模型开发循环的评估工作台

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in May 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from May 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 5 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 5 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: Startup’s nuclear-inspired cooling system could make data centers more sustainable
items.summary: Founded by two researchers from MIT, Ferveret reduces the amount of energy and water required to cool the chips that power AI.
items.title_zh: 初创公司的核冷却系统可以使数据中心更具可持续性
items.summary_zh: Ferveret 由麻省理工学院的两名研究人员创立，可减少冷却人工智能芯片所需的能源和水量。

items.title: The crucial human component in computing and AI
items.summary: The MIT Ethics of Computing Research Symposium brought together experts and researchers working at the heart of ethical and social impact in technology.
items.title_zh: 计算和人工智能中至关重要的人类组成部分
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院计算机伦理研究研讨会汇集了从事技术伦理和社会影响核心工作的专家和研究人员。

items.title: NSF renews support for MIT-led AI and physics institute, expanding a new model for discovery
items.summary: IAIFI enters its second phase with increased funding, broader ambitions, and a growing community at the frontier of AI and fundamental physics.
items.title_zh: NSF 继续支持麻省理工学院领导的人工智能和物理研究所，拓展新的发现模式
items.summary_zh: IAIFI 进入第二阶段，资金增加、雄心勃勃，人工智能和基础物理学前沿社区不断壮大。

items.title: The new oil? Inside the effort to turn AI computing power into a tradeable commodity
items.summary: AI compute futures could eventually rival some of the world's largest commodity markets, Silicon Data's Carmen Li believes.
items.title_zh: 新油？将人工智能计算能力转变为可交易商品的努力
items.summary_zh: Silicon Data 的 Carmen Li 认为，人工智能计算未来最终可能会与世界上一些最大的商品市场相媲美。

items.title: People in China are watching the World Cup differently this time
items.summary: A 12-hour-plus time difference and various streaming options are influencing how people in China watch the World Cup.
items.title_zh: 这次中国人看世界杯的方式不一样了
items.summary_zh: 12个多小时的时差和各种流媒体选项正在影响中国人观看世界杯的方式。

items.title: CFTC chair Selig defends decision to approve ‘perps’ in U.S.
items.summary: Michael Selig said that incumbents will always fear the future, but it's important to develop the new asset class domestically rather than only offshore.
items.title_zh: CFTC 主席 Selig 为美国批准“perps”的决定进行辩护
items.summary_zh: 迈克尔·塞利格(Michael Selig)表示，现有企业总是担心未来，但重要的是在国内而不是仅在海外开发新的资产类别。

items.title: SpaceX IPO leaves retail investors with too few shares and a tough hold-or-sell decision
items.summary: Those who did receive stock are taking different approaches, with some selling into the company's market debut while others holding for the long haul.
items.title_zh: SpaceX 首次公开募股让散户投资者持有的股票太少，并且面临持有或出售的艰难决定
items.summary_zh: 那些确实收到股票的人正在采取不同的方法，一些人在公司首次上市时出售，而另一些人则长期持有。

items.title: SpaceX doesn't have a timeline for its human missions to Mars. Kalshi traders say don't expect it this decade
items.summary: Traders on prediction market platform Kalshi see only an 18% chance the Elon Musk-led company gets to Earth's neighbor by 2030.
items.title_zh: SpaceX 没有载人火星任务的时间表。卡尔希贸易商称这十年不会出现这种情况
items.summary_zh: 预测市场平台 Kalshi 上的交易员认为，埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 领导的公司到 2030 年到达地球邻居的可能性只有 18%。

items.title: Ron Baron bought $1 billion of SpaceX shares in IPO, lifting stake to $25 billion
items.summary: "I think we're gonna make hundreds of billions of dollars," Baron said Monday on CNBC's "Squawk Box."
items.title_zh: Ron Baron 在 IPO 中购买了 10 亿美元的 SpaceX 股票，将持股比例提升至 250 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 巴伦周一在 CNBC 的“Squawk Box”节目中表示：“我认为我们将赚取数千亿美元。”

items.title: Charlie Javice reportedly seeking a pardon from Trump
items.summary: Javice founded a startup called Frank that JPMorgan acquired in 2021 for $175 million.
items.title_zh: 据报道查理·贾维斯寻求特朗普的赦免
items.summary_zh: Javice 创立了一家名为 Frank 的初创公司，摩根大通于 2021 年以 1.75 亿美元收购了该公司。

items.title: Russian artist and Putin critic shot dead in Poland
items.summary: Robert Kuzovkov, who used the pseudonym Semyon Skrepetsky, has been known for his caricatures of politicians including Vladimir Putin.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯艺术家和普京评论家在波兰被枪杀
items.summary_zh: 罗伯特·库佐夫科夫（Robert Kuzovkov）使用笔名谢苗·斯克雷佩茨基（Semyon Skrepetsky），因其对弗拉基米尔·普京（Vladimir Putin）等政客的漫画而闻名。

items.title: German broadcaster removes TV intro after Elon Musk takes legal action
items.summary: ZDF TV responded to a "cease and desist" letter after the tech trillionaire condemned the broadcaster's "outrageous lies".
items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克采取法律行动后，德国广播公司删除了电视简介
items.summary_zh: 在这位科技亿万富翁谴责该广播公司“令人发指的谎言”后，德国电视二台（ZDF TV）对一封“停止和停止”的信做出了回应。

items.title: Hundreds of cats stolen for food in Vietnam rescued by police, welfare group says
items.summary: Police have arrested nine people and rescued more than 400 cats destined for slaughter, with more than 40 reunited with their owners.
items.title_zh: 福利组织称，越南数百只被盗用作食物的猫被警方救出
items.summary_zh: 警方逮捕了 9 人，解救了 400 多只准备被宰杀的猫，其中 40 多只猫与主人团聚。

items.title: France's oldest female detainee, 79, goes on trial for in-law's grisly murder
items.summary: A dismembered body found in a chain-bound trunk in the Seine in 1995 was only recently connected to the defendant by DNA evidence.
items.title_zh: 法国最年长女性被拘留者，79岁，因残忍谋杀姻亲而受审
items.summary_zh: 1995 年，在塞纳河的一个用链子捆住的箱子里发现了一具被肢解的尸体，直到最近才通过 DNA 证据将其与被告联系起来。

items.title: Venezuela signs deal with US energy giant to rebuild power grid
items.summary: The deal with General Electric is the latest sign of co-operation between US firms and Venezuela's interim government.
items.title_zh: 委内瑞拉与美国能源巨头签署重建电网协议
items.summary_zh: 与通用电气的交易是美国公司与委内瑞拉临时政府合作的最新迹象。

items.title: Eight dead after US Air Force B-52 bomber crashes in California
items.summary: The incident occurred on Monday morning while the aircraft had been on a routine test mission.
items.title_zh: 美国空军 B-52 轰炸机在加利福尼亚州坠毁，八人死亡
items.summary_zh: 该事件发生在周一早上，当时飞机正在进行例行测试任务。

items.title: 'Dancing girl's' bare torso restored in Indian textbook after backlash
items.summary: A picture in a new school textbook had covered up the naked torso of the famous figurine with dark shading.
items.title_zh: 印度教科书在强烈反对后恢复了“舞女”裸露的躯干
items.summary_zh: 新教科书中的一张图片用深色阴影遮盖了著名雕像的赤裸躯干。

items.title: After a Bitter Split, European Leaders Play Nice With Trump
items.summary: A peace framework with Iran, and hope for cooperation with Ukraine, softened the tone on Tuesday at a Group of 7 gathering in France.
items.title_zh: 痛苦分裂后，欧洲领导人与特朗普相处融洽
items.summary_zh: 周二在法国举行的七国集团会议上，与伊朗的和平框架以及与乌克兰合作的希望软化了基调。

items.title: Australia’s Former Electricity Substations Are Being Turned Into Homes
items.summary: In a country where the housing market is squeezed, decommissioned electrical substations are in demand as refurbished residences.
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚前变电站正在改建为住宅
items.summary_zh: 在一个房地产市场受到挤压的国家，退役的变电站作为翻新住宅的需求很大。

items.title: Can a Trump-Modi Meeting Reset U.S.-India Relations?
items.summary: Despite mutual praise between the two leaders, there has been a series of setbacks to U.S. relations with India since they last met more than a year ago.
items.title_zh: 特朗普-莫迪会晤能否重置美印关系？
items.summary_zh: 尽管两国领导人相互赞扬，但自一年多前上次会面以来，美国与印度的关系出现了一系列挫折。

items.title: France, Britain and Other Countries Say They’ll Send Ships to the Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: For months, a coalition led by Britain and France has been preparing to send minesweepers and other ships to secure the strait once the fighting ends. That moment may finally be here.
items.title_zh: 法国、英国等国表示将派遣船只前往霍尔木兹海峡
items.summary_zh: 几个月来，由英国和法国领导的联盟一直准备在战斗结束后派遣扫雷舰和其他船只来保卫海峡。那一刻可能终于到来了。

items.title: ‘Hockey Night in Canada,’ a Saturday Night Ritual on the CBC, Is No More
items.summary: The longtime over-the-air telecast will no longer be free after the national broadcaster, and Rogers Sportsnet, the N.H.L. rights-holder, could not agree on a sub-licensing deal.
items.title_zh: CBC 周六晚节目“加拿大冰球之夜”已不再

items.summary: The asset manager joins BlackRock, Franklin Templeton and others competing to manage reserves backing the growing stablecoin market.

items.title: Y Combinator reveals a new AI agent that can build and run an entire business just from a text message
items.summary: Y Combinator's Locus Founder lets users text a business idea via iMessage, SMS, or Telegram, and the AI handles the rest.

items.summary: The deal comes after MANTRA’s token suffered a major collapse in 2025 and then the company announced a restructure and layoffs.

items.summary_zh: 此次交易是在 MANTRA 代币于 2025 年遭受重大崩溃之后该公司宣布重组和裁员之后进行的。

items.title: SEC Chair Atkins defends CFTC’s Selig despite questions over agency’s ability to regulate prediction markets
